extensions.description: This MCP server provides email sending functionality using Protonmail's SMTP service. It allows both Claude Desktop and Cline VSCode extension to send emails on your behalf using your Protonmail credentials.

extensions.name: claude-code-zed
extensions.description: Zed extension for Claude Code CLI integration

extensions.name: chat-export
extensions.description: Browser extension that allows you to export chat conversations from the LLM sites ChatGPT and Claude to Markdown, XML, JSON, and HTML.

extensions.name: vs-claude
extensions.description: VS Code extension and MCP server so Claude Code can open files, diffs and manipulate VS Code in other ways.

extensions.name: OmniPost-AI
extensions.description: AI-powered Chrome extension for generating and publishing posts to Facebook, Threads, and X using ChatGPT, CLAUDE and Gemini.

extensions.name: spark-claude-extension
extensions.description: Spark for Claude

extensions.name: prompts-chat-extension
extensions.description: Chrome extension to browse, filter, and run 1000+ AI prompts directly on ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more. Features smart filtering and Side Panel support.

extensions.name: claude-code-local-for-vscode
extensions.description: Claude Code VS Code extension patched for Force Local mode — run CLI locally, proxy file ops to remote server via VS Code Remote SSH

extensions.name: system-prompts-of-claude-chrome
extensions.description: Claude Chrome Extension System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models

extensions.name: claude-usage-monitor
extensions.description: VS Code extension to monitor Claude.ai usage and display in status bar

extensions.name: claude-code-rtl-extension
extensions.description: VS Code/Cursor extension that adds RTL (Right-to-Left) support for Hebrew and Arabic to the "Claude Code for VS Code" extension

extensions.name: ClaudeMate
extensions.description: ClaudeMate - Browser extension that brings Claude AI's official chat experience to sidebar, supporting cross-tab conversations and local storage for seamless AI interactions.

extensions.name: claude-for-chrome
extensions.description: Open Claude in Chrome extension. No Claude account or waitlist is required. Simply use your own API key to get instant access.

extensions.name: InstantLingua
extensions.description: InstantLingua – LLM-Driven PopClip Extension for Translation & Writing. Supports AI from OpenAI, Claude, Grok, and Gemini.

extensions.name: pi-native-search
extensions.description: Pi extension that adds web_search and web_fetch tools using each provider's native search backend (ZAI, Anthropic, Google, OpenAI, xAI, Claude Code subscription), with DuckDuckGo fallback.

extensions.name: claude-engram
extensions.description: Brain-inspired persistent memory for Claude.ai. A single React artifact gives Claude salience scoring, forgetting curves, sleep consolidation, and context briefings — modeled on human hippocampal memory formation. Runs entirely inside the chat interface. No API key, no server, no extension needed.

extensions.name: claudetuner
extensions.description: Chrome extension to track and visualize your Claude AI usage

extensions.name: claude-depester
extensions.description: Patches Claude Code CLI and VS Code extension to replace whimsical loading words with simple 'Thinking'.

extensions.name: shareclaude
extensions.description: A Chrome Extension to share your Claude chats with one click https://shareclaude.pages.dev

extensions.name: diffus
extensions.description: Extension to see diff while working with CLI AI (Claude Code, Codex, etc.)

extensions.name: json-prompter
extensions.description: JSON Prompter is a powerful Chrome extension that transforms how you create structured prompts for AI models. Whether you're working with ChatGPT, Claude, VEO3, or any other AI tool, our intuitive visual builder makes crafting perfect JSON prompts effortless.

extensions.name: agent-usage-monitor
extensions.description: Raycast extension for real-time Claude Code session monitoring with hooks-based state tracking

extensions.name: claude-usage-extension
extensions.description: GNOME Shell extension that displays your Claude Code usage percentage
